data.hit_die: 8+4d6 + 2 hit points for each beast level beyond 1st

features.name: Beast Shape
features.description: You can transform into a beast with the same hit points as you have hit dice.

features.name: Legendary Actions
features.description: When you transform, you assume the beast's hit points and hit dice.

features.name: Increased Hit Dice
features.description: For every 10 years that pass, your body ages only 1 year. If the creature has a higher bonus in its stat block than yours, use the creature's bonus instead of yours.

features.name: Unlimited Wild Shape
features.description: At 20th level, you can use your Wild Shape an unlimited number of times.
